verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.7.1 BAL @ SEA Stage-1 MVE capital-safety canary completed the full BAL/SEA lifecycle: official final score Baltimore Orioles 0, Seattle Mariners 3 was verified; contest 48 was scored; speculation 37 settled to home/lower/Seattle; the winning controlled live-fill and setup seed positions were claimed; final claim sweeps, public commitments/orderbook, and live-MM process checks are zero. Caveats are limited to LAA/ATH being a prep-only backup outside this BAL/SEA artifact and no separate restart/cold-start probe.

capabilities.notes: BAL away @ SEA home contest 48/spec 37 passed official status, identity, allowlist, and quote-ready gates.
v0.7.1 CLI/SDK and MM SHA/pins verified; install/build/typecheck/test/smoke passed.
Reserved live maker was clean before start; balances/allowances were sufficient and bounded.
Only bounded approvals were used; live auto-approval stayed off.
Pre-live quote dry-run for contest 48 returned pipeline=computed and canQuote=true.
5 tiny live commitments posted, all target 48/37 only.
Exactly one controlled fill succeeded against live-posted commitment 0x5ec9a073… using mm-shakeout-flow-a.
Telemetry captured the fill with source own-state-stream.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero and no orphan live MM process remained.
Not run for this Stage-1 live-window artifact; final zero-exposure and process checks were run instead.
Official final score BAL 0, SEA 3 was verified and contest 48 scored.
Winning lower/Seattle live-fill and setup seed positions were claimed; losing upper/Baltimore positions are no-op.
Tracked live maker risk and combined open+active maker risk stayed within Stage-1 caps; postgame gas recorded.

transactions.purpose: Bounded TreasuryModule USDC approval for setup contest creator/seed maker.
Bounded TreasuryModule USDC approval for setup seed taker.
Bounded PositionModule USDC approval for live maker.
Create/verify BAL @ SEA contest 48 before the live MM window.
Setup seed/open moneyline fill for speculation 37.
Exactly one controlled live MM fill by mm-shakeout-flow-a against commitment 0x5ec9a0733f95d1edd6dcb269db4c70763864fb424e11bb4603a2d9c1996a5da2.
Request score for contest 48 after official source showed Seattle Mariners 3, Baltimore Orioles 0.
Oracle callback set final contest 48 scores BAL 0, SEA 3.
Claim mm-shakeout-flow-a winning controlled live-fill lower/Seattle position.
Claim ospex-flow-a winning setup seed lower/Seattle position.
